# CWE-798: Use of Hard-coded Credentials (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-798-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: database credentials are embedded directly in source code.
// Secrets in the repository are exposed to anyone with read access to the tree.
func ConnectReporting(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	dsn := "postgres://reporting:Tr4ck3rP@ss@db.internal:5432/reports?sslmode=disable"
	db, err := sql.Open("postgres", dsn)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer db.Close()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"connected":true}`))
}
